<!-- Thanks for contributing to SecuroGuard! Please fill this out. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Open a discussion issue first for larger changes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I built and tested locally with Java 21 (`./gradlew build`).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for every behavioral change.
- [ ] This change does **not** weaken containment, hashing, advisory verification,
      baseline trust, monitoring delivery, or quarantine safety.
- [ ] No scanned JAR is ever executed or has its classes loaded.
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, accounts, file-content uploads, secrets, API keys, or
      bundled binaries were added.
- [ ] I did **not** include live malware, tokens, credentials, or private files.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant.

## Notes on what was / was not verified

<!-- Be honest: e.g. "GUI screens require a running client and were not automated." -->
